title: Annual Tech Symposium 2026
description: A full-day symposium bringing together students, faculty, and industry professionals to explore the latest trends in technology, AI, and software engineering. Includes keynote sessions, workshops, and networking opportunities.

title: Inter-University Football Tournament
description: Three-day football tournament featuring 12 universities competing for the championship trophy. Come support your team and enjoy food stalls and live commentary.

title: Cultural Night: Echoes of Bengal
description: An evening celebrating the rich culture of Bengal through music, dance, poetry recitation, and traditional art. Open to all students and faculty. Traditional attire encouraged.

title: Research Paper Writing Workshop
description: An intensive two-day workshop on academic writing, citation standards, literature review, and getting published in peer-reviewed journals. Certificate provided upon completion.

title: Freshers' Welcome Social
description: A fun-filled afternoon welcoming new students to campus. Activities include icebreaker games, guided campus tours, free refreshments, and a chance to meet department seniors.

title: Hackathon: Build for Tomorrow
description: A 24-hour hackathon challenging students to build solutions around themes of sustainability, healthcare, and education using cutting-edge technologies. Teams of up to 4 members. Prizes worth BDT 50,000.

title: Academic Excellence Awards 2026
description: Annual ceremony honouring students who have demonstrated outstanding academic achievement, leadership, and contribution to campus life. Parents and guardians are welcome.

title: Photography & Digital Art Exhibition
description: Showcasing the creative works of students from the Fine Arts and Media departments. Features photography, digital illustrations, and mixed-media art. Open gallery format — walk in at any time during the day.
venue: Art Gallery, Admin Block Ground Floor

title: Leadership & Career Development Seminar
description: Industry leaders and alumni share insights on leadership, career growth, resume building, and interview preparation. Dedicated Q&A session and portfolio review available.

title: Yoga & Mental Wellness Day
description: A full-day wellness event featuring guided yoga sessions, mindfulness workshops, stress management talks, and relaxation spaces. Free for all enrolled students.
